1827314.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
1827314.transcript: Seriously. She is such a bad loser.

2624535.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
2624535.transcript: Primal beasts are full of mysteries, aren't they?

10585354.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
10585354.transcript: Let's hurry. This place gives me goosebumps.

18096952.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
18096952.transcript: Couldn't have done it without your trusty axe!

24099198.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
24099198.transcript: The same to you, Lady Charlotta!

24708056.label: PL2200_vo_DMG_rise_3
24708056.transcript: Okay, that was a good one.

26255826.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
26255826.transcript: Is that what I... I mean, yeah! Exactly!

32657244.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_4_2
32657244.transcript: Come on, suckers! Let's see what you got!

34706078.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
34706078.transcript: Thorn and sword, a timeless dance!

36851830.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
36851830.transcript: Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh!

42994977.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
42994977.transcript: Well, I don't think we're going to get bored here.

49060188.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
49060188.transcript: Sorry, did that seem like showing off? Good.

49490041.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
49490041.transcript: Keep your heads in the game!

50262539.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
50262539.transcript: Aww, poor little fella. I promise I'm a good guy.

51170927.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
51170927.transcript: Just one set. Feel the burn.

53440845.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
53440845.transcript: With power like this, I could get on board with teamwork.

57024336.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
57024336.transcript: It's too late for compassion now.

62459786.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
62459786.transcript: I'll give you this, you're stupidly persistent.

64500749.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
64500749.transcript: Time to bid you folks adios!

69866739.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
69866739.transcript: Yep. They don't call you the Lord of Flames for nothing.

74073963.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
74073963.transcript: That's a colorful description, but I'll take it!

78747262.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
78747262.transcript: Gotta hit the abs. Easy peasy.

79158326.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
79158326.transcript: Keep up the good work, Rackam!

83256944.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
83256944.transcript: You think this primal can stop us? You've got another thing coming!

89094736.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
89094736.transcript: Alright! Let's get a move on!

94045158.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
94045158.transcript: It must suck to be on the losing side.

95132838.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
95132838.transcript: It's kinda funny. We're both sword guys, but our fighting styles couldn't be more different.

96412878.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
96412878.transcript: Hold on! That sounded like a compliment!

102132316.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
102132316.transcript: We're not out of the woods yet!

109873465.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
109873465.transcript: Alright, Mr. Motivation, let's do it!

117127988.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
117127988.transcript: I do believe I'm the strongest gentleman in all the skies.

118636458.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
118636458.transcript: Am I glad I'm on your side!

121577993.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
121577993.transcript: Cute and deadly, I dig it!

134087913.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
134087913.transcript: We can't let him escape with Lyria!

143825888.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
143825888.transcript: Oh please, I'm nothing without your hefty support.

147802944.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_comeback_2
147802944.transcript: Sorry, I feel like an idiot.

158507731.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
158507731.transcript: Give it up for the almighty Rolan!

158673619.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
158673619.transcript: Thanks! You wanna take the next one?

164727456.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
164727456.transcript: We'll wrap this up in five!

170030474.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
170030474.transcript: You still in there, Eddy? We're comin' for ya!

176691760.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
176691760.transcript: Oh nice, this guy looks fun.

177196645.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
177196645.transcript: Oh yeah, right on the money!

178367432.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_8_charge_1
178367432.transcript: And know you have the sword sovereign's aid!

182495307.label: PL2200_vo_DUO_recovery_B_2
182495307.transcript: I don't seem desperate, do I?

189365919.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
189365919.transcript: Couldn't have done it better myself, Ed.

194623355.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
194623355.transcript: Holy knights are made of something else, huh?

196418070.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
196418070.transcript: Sylvan of the Eternals is badass!

211433323.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
211433323.transcript: They don't call me the strongest man in the sky for nothing!

212338279.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
212338279.transcript: Time to say good night, pup.

219995630.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
219995630.transcript: Looks like we poked the bear too much!

220676650.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
220676650.transcript: What can I say? We're a ragtag bunch!

226286585.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
226286585.transcript: You wield that sword beautifully, just like a butterfly.

226623936.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
226623936.transcript: Wait a minute... those techniques remind me of Ayato.

227180994.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
227180994.transcript: You said it! You gotta take me to the gym sometime!

229534085.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
229534085.transcript: So, did you like what you saw?

235625533.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_lockon_2
235625533.transcript: I'm going to ruin their whole career.

240797431.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
240797431.transcript: So we're up against the Dragon of Destruction. Fun.

242594610.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
242594610.transcript: There's a time and a place for every power.

243705409.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_7_god_3
243705409.transcript: Sure! I can do this the hard way!

253340512.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
253340512.transcript: I gotta say, that power of yours is pretty interesting!

262040174.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
262040174.transcript: Wait, I thought you were the mysterious one in this crew.

296322382.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
296322382.transcript: Yeah! We had perfect synergy on that one!

299589733.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_4_god_1
299589733.transcript: Go on, dig your own grave.

308975272.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
308975272.transcript: One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six!

321214270.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
321214270.transcript: We either put up or shut up! And I don't shut up!

321820479.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
321820479.transcript: Oh, that shield won't stop me!

321877171.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
321877171.transcript: I don't mind playing teacher, especially for such a motivated student.

334717631.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
334717631.transcript: I like the cut of this guy's jib.

335107117.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
335107117.transcript: Kill a god, save the skies. It's as easy as that.

342704121.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
342704121.transcript: Prepped and ready for the next fight!

346610837.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
346610837.transcript: That's what you deserve! For messing with the best!

354692526.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
354692526.transcript: You think numbers will save you?

363472887.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
363472887.transcript: Nice! Got it square in the muzzle!

374030334.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
374030334.transcript: You know it! Swords are just the coolest!

375129061.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
375129061.transcript: Sorry, we got places to be.

376633535.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
376633535.transcript: You've got a handle on it, right?

377883561.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
377883561.transcript: So this is what it's like to fight with a living legend.

377887672.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
377887672.transcript: You've got nothing on our crew!

392339469.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
392339469.transcript: Our next fight awaits your whip, my good fairy!

392544479.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
392544479.transcript: You want me to teach you? Someone pinch me!

394985402.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
394985402.transcript: You're like a one-man wrecking crew. Maybe I should let you handle all the fighting.

399401062.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
399401062.transcript: Just you wait. I'm only getting started.

402085327.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
402085327.transcript: Gotta say, it's nice having a veteran skyfarer watching my tail.

409296338.label: PL2200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1700
409296338.transcript: I feel bad for you guys!

409712460.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
409712460.transcript: You mean you, right? Boy, let me catch a breath.

410596980.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_2
410596980.transcript: Put some pep in your step, crew!

417642976.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
417642976.transcript: You'll get there one day, champ!

417714375.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_6_god_2
417714375.transcript: Come on! Give me a challenge!

421082642.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
421082642.transcript: You call that a sword collection?

425835265.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
425835265.transcript: Heh heh, I get that a lot.

428930325.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_lockon_5
428930325.transcript: Great. The welcome squad is here.

448453048.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
448453048.transcript: You've got nothing to prove. You're already a chip off Ayaka's block.

453083133.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
453083133.transcript: Unra! Toian! Thrio! For! Fiff! Seox!

461947992.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
461947992.transcript: The bigger they are, the harder they fall!

468925035.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_7_2
468925035.transcript: Do I need to go all out?

471343747.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
471343747.transcript: Think we can climb this whole pillar on foot?

473923118.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
473923118.transcript: Brilliant swordsmanship! You're like a shark in the water!

481790280.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_congrats_3
481790280.transcript: Ooh, bang-up job there! Nice, very nice!

484717601.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
484717601.transcript: Yep! Pair of vets like us, they stood no chance!

487617309.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
487617309.transcript: Go ahead, peons! Do your worst!

496668851.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
496668851.transcript: Impressive work, O noble Sword of Lumiel!

504006690.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
504006690.transcript: Your false profit days are numbered.

514308639.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
514308639.transcript: Think you could hurry up and lose a little faster?

515278459.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
515278459.transcript: How'd you get there, wee friend?

520067545.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
520067545.transcript: There we go! That's more like it!

520475978.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
520475978.transcript: That technique... it uh really caught my eye.

522454591.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
522454591.transcript: I've got the best timing in the business.

535919801.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
535919801.transcript: Phew! I'm glad you're an our crew.

538877791.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
538877791.transcript: I knew you were fast, but sheesh!

546435915.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
546435915.transcript: What I say? Nothing to it.

562131267.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
562131267.transcript: Nice timing! We make a great team!

562641710.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
562641710.transcript: Wait, smug mug? What's that supposed to mean?

562996396.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
562996396.transcript: Better watch out for any big attacks.

563691090.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
563691090.transcript: Keep it up! We've almost got him!

564350939.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
564350939.transcript: That was some sharp shooting! Well done, you sly fox!

566534124.label: PL2200_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_3
566534124.transcript: There's still work to be done.

570288781.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
570288781.transcript: Hey now, what's with the tone?

572189859.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
572189859.transcript: Bingo! You got him square in the face!

573756432.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
573756432.transcript: My blade is at your command, my liege.

577652513.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
577652513.transcript: What? No! I'm hard at work over here, Scout's honor!

578911298.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
578911298.transcript: You got it! Use me or lose me!

579502117.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
579502117.transcript: I'm not much of a spearman.

582256809.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
582256809.transcript: Who am I to disobey the supreme Primark?

583238064.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
583238064.transcript: Just like C-X. He's a lot cooler.

587508338.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
587508338.transcript: You look like you need a sword, Sovereign.

612327790.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
612327790.transcript: Let's bring this bad boy down!

612985124.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
612985124.transcript: They don't call me the Star-Sword Sovereign for nothing!

615018676.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
615018676.transcript: You know, I think I'm starting to like Zegagrande.

615424419.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
615424419.transcript: Alright... One... Two... Three... Four... Five... Six... Not too shabby.

621774622.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
621774622.transcript: Don't say it like that, I'll start to feel the pressure!

622566544.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
622566544.transcript: Send him back to the junkyard!

638771315.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
638771315.transcript: We don't have time to play.

641211004.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
641211004.transcript: True strength? Whatever do you mean?

645542903.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
645542903.transcript: Maybe I should let you do all the work.

650913938.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
650913938.transcript: Wouldn't trade this crew for the world!

651478628.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
651478628.transcript: I gotta get me some of that Primark power!

662155168.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
662155168.transcript: More like Vain work makes the pain work!

664499792.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
664499792.transcript: Anything for you, my sour friend!

670567979.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
670567979.transcript: Oh, you tell me! Love that attitude!

679731434.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
679731434.transcript: Butter my biscuit, why don't ya?

681588630.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
681588630.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah

683620118.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
683620118.transcript: Come on, Percival! We've got more baddies to pop!

686540759.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
686540759.transcript: Havir sure recruits a lot of you.

687794946.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
687794946.transcript: You really know how to handle yourself. Maybe you should take the next group.

689146415.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
689146415.transcript: Oh, I think you could give Ayato a run for his money.

694061164.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
694061164.transcript: Let me take the front line!

697417214.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
697417214.transcript: The monastery awaits. Let's hoof it!

703222337.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
703222337.transcript: Looks all shadowy, but I can still cut right through it.

704155241.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
704155241.transcript: Hey, she's pretty good at this!

706209861.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
706209861.transcript: If you're not fighting with soul, you've already lost.

706869070.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
706869070.transcript: I like the whole in-your-face fighting style, but watch your back, okay, bud?

728750522.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
728750522.transcript: Man, are all machines so predictable?

731100115.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_4_1
731100115.transcript: You gonna sit there or are you gonna fight me?

731401181.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
731401181.transcript: We're still up! Watch my six!

732523065.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_throw_slow_reaction_3
732523065.transcript: Hey, look! A barely moving target!

732647370.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
732647370.transcript: Yep, you are one heavy hitter. Makes me jealous.

733882905.label: PL2200_vo_DMG_rise_4
733882905.transcript: Got me square in the jaw!

735236776.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
735236776.transcript: Poor guys. They think they stand a chance.

747480298.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
747480298.transcript: I can see you appreciate the feistier things in life.

749902379.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
749902379.transcript: I'll give that link attack a solid B.

752203860.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
752203860.transcript: Remind me not to mess with you!

755380286.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
755380286.transcript: I bet you say that to all the swordmasters.

771068400.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
771068400.transcript: Then I'll give this next one some sauce just for you!

772278432.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
772278432.transcript: I must say, you fight beautifully.

775096316.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
775096316.transcript: Let's take it down for good!

775339661.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
775339661.transcript: Don't hold back just because they're puny!

780562299.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_1
780562299.transcript: Come on! Move it! Move it!

782849633.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
782849633.transcript: Come on, we've got more baddies to bust!

784700684.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
784700684.transcript: Better keep our head in the game!

785519738.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
785519738.transcript: Don't let it open its gates!

801932981.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_A
801932981.transcript: You don't have to twist my leg!

803115325.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
803115325.transcript: Bring it on! It's go time!

804422674.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_1_FIRST
804422674.transcript: Ho ho! Now this is interesting!

804592669.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
804592669.transcript: You pack a lot of punch for such an adorable package!

808245265.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
808245265.transcript: I love it when a crew comes together!

811774709.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
811774709.transcript: And you, my good man, have an excellent eye.

814290074.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
814290074.transcript: Come on! Is that all you got?

818278091.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
818278091.transcript: Hah! I knew we would win from the start!

824532504.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
824532504.transcript: What can I say? I'm an eternal.

833235806.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_1
833235806.transcript: Hang on! I'm on my way!

836583853.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
836583853.transcript: Too early to back down now!

838249075.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
838249075.transcript: Don't let them close to her!

845466866.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
845466866.transcript: I feel like you took the words right out of my mouth.

846193597.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
846193597.transcript: Look at all your handsome little soldiers!

849022754.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
849022754.transcript: I'm just happy to be of service.

851316812.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
851316812.transcript: It's gonna take a lot more than a fake primal to stop us!

863226277.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
863226277.transcript: Time to face the music, Lilith!

866005707.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
866005707.transcript: Best stay focused. Things could get hairy.

869953920.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
869953920.transcript: Hey! Don't go charging in without your front line!

871295824.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
871295824.transcript: Oh, a wind primal. Easy breezy.

894953876.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
894953876.transcript: You're not gonna forget that one!

903921261.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
903921261.transcript: Hey now, I'm giving it a little effort.

917608758.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
917608758.transcript: Now she knows her way around a blade.

918317040.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
918317040.transcript: Oops, could you tell? I'll dial it up for the next foe.

921748496.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
921748496.transcript: I feel bad for any chumps who get in our way.

934394002.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
934394002.transcript: Crab! I repeat, we got crab!

969864907.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
969864907.transcript: Hey, we make a pretty good team!

971372912.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
971372912.transcript: This one's for all the marbles!

971581785.label: PL2200_vo_DMG_down_1
971581785.transcript: Maybe I should rethink my approach.

973628034.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
973628034.transcript: Is it just me or were we on fire?

975780922.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
975780922.transcript: So, folks, who's up for adventure?

980849334.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
980849334.transcript: Is it just me or are you getting stronger every day?

987780661.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
987780661.transcript: Star Sword Sovereign, at your service.

991985718.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
991985718.transcript: Yep! They were no match for us!

998469120.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
998469120.transcript: Yep! Guess I gotta get serious.

1002429587.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
1002429587.transcript: Got it. Just point me to the bad guys.

1008755005.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
1008755005.transcript: Yeah! We showed them who's boss!

1017023276.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_C
1017023276.transcript: Now THIS is my favorite part!

1027344404.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
1027344404.transcript: You're lucky I'm on your side.

1027422548.label: PL2200_vo_ETC_lockon_1
1027422548.transcript: This ain't gonna work out for ya.

1030008579.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
1030008579.transcript: Pull my leg, why don't you?

1039176939.label: PL2200_vo_ATK_ability_8_charge_3
1039176939.transcript: Endow my blades with your light! Guide the seven swords to victory!

1044363631.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
1044363631.transcript: Yep, that was pretty much perfect.

1048475966.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
1048475966.transcript: You won't stop us this time, Eid!

1068433909.label: PL2200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
1068433909.transcript: So what? We can take this lug down!

1068525697.label: PL2200_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_2
1068525697.transcript: Guess I can't sit around all day.

1073115787.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_call_2
1073115787.transcript: Yo! Can you make it over here?

4007909.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
4007909.transcript: Hey, so uh... can I copy that sword spirit? Please?

5514139.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
5514139.transcript: Thanks, Ferry! Now let's take it home!

6013707.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
6013707.transcript: Nah, you give me way too much credit. Appreciate the thought though.

45301381.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
45301381.transcript: You really put in the legwork, don't you?

62359917.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
62359917.transcript: Oh, you've really honed that rage!

77116164.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
77116164.transcript: Plants brighten up everything. Even battlefields.

91271270.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
91271270.transcript: Buttering me up won't help you.

102292425.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
102292425.transcript: Seofon, the Star-Sword Sovereign! Good night, folks!

103127133.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
103127133.transcript: Let me cut you off there. I'll explain later, okay?

120918226.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
120918226.transcript: Just happy I kept up with ya.

166330220.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
166330220.transcript: After we're done here, how about you let me see that fancy collection you got?

170085394.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
170085394.transcript: If you're gonna insult me, at least commit to the pun!

181845434.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
181845434.transcript: These are spirit swords. A bit different from Maggie's magic blades.

181966154.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
181966154.transcript: Ooh, careful hot stuff! Even I'm starting to melt!

192894380.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
192894380.transcript: I suppose you're not one to tread lightly, huh?

207575911.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
207575911.transcript: Yep! That was a perfect one hundred!

211305914.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
211305914.transcript: Wish you had one of your own?

215244246.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
215244246.transcript: Glad we turned you into a true believer!

226384927.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
226384927.transcript: I sleep soundly knowing you'll move mountains for me.

226595814.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
226595814.transcript: Hah! Nothing can stop that tidal wave!

245934338.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
245934338.transcript: Oh, you're one of those stab first, ask later types, huh?

260365952.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
260365952.transcript: Your swordcraft is more fearsome than any dragon I've seen!

268358620.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
268358620.transcript: Man, this is a breeze with a wedge doing the heavy lifting!

269445537.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
269445537.transcript: Awesome is as awesome does, my good man!

277576360.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
277576360.transcript: Whew! Thanks for coming to my rescue!

292705546.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
292705546.transcript: Phew! Almost panicked there! Thanks a billion!

293562696.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
293562696.transcript: What's that, Edd? You want the full story behind my awe-inspiring collection?

315582007.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
315582007.transcript: Good thing you're on our side.

318578666.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
318578666.transcript: When you really think about it, what are titles worth?

320322925.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0000
320322925.transcript: We'd die for you, you know!

342269457.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
342269457.transcript: How can you say that? I've been trying to impress you.

358340089.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
358340089.transcript: And? You like what you see?

361584726.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
361584726.transcript: Hah! What kind of stakes are we talkin'?

414389990.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
414389990.transcript: Please do! You're nowhere near your limits!

453466328.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
453466328.transcript: A plus x work Vane! Big fan!

468682172.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
468682172.transcript: Oh, not for a long, long time. Wait, am I crying?

497297079.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
497297079.transcript: I'm sorry, Seofon can't come to the transceiver right now.

500449173.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
500449173.transcript: I'm insulted! I always give my all!

508137021.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
508137021.transcript: Luck? I just take what the enemy gives me.

560511322.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
560511322.transcript: That was too easy. Up for another, Narmaya?

572549186.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
572549186.transcript: We're like two peas in an exceptional pod!

593225989.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
593225989.transcript: Score one for the super cute genius alchemist!

594769647.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
594769647.transcript: Uh-oh! I'd better sleep with one eye open!

599499649.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
599499649.transcript: Guess I need to level up my game.

607577281.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
607577281.transcript: Yeah. Still a ways off before he reaches his potential.

625457509.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
625457509.transcript: Man, if I had half your confidence, my life woulda turned out way different.

641195114.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
641195114.transcript: Hey, don't exaggerate. I'm uh, as deep as a fishbowl. Honest.

660910860.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
660910860.transcript: How would I put it... Ah! Mesmerizing!

667371467.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
667371467.transcript: You can't ask for a duel during a battle! It's unprofessional!

669839971.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
669839971.transcript: You were fantastic, Embraesk! Simply stunning!

707864834.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
707864834.transcript: Is it just me or did you get even stronger?

763347403.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
763347403.transcript: You know, Tien's pretty quiet too. You sharpshooters don't talk much, huh?

771674228.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
771674228.transcript: Spar with a legend, you mean? I thought you'd never ask.

779737144.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
779737144.transcript: Oh, stop! My ego's big enough!

813561548.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
813561548.transcript: Served up a big helping of pain, didn't we?

831442191.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
831442191.transcript: That works every time! A hundred percent of the time!

846184128.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
846184128.transcript: Well said! Look out bad guys! Justice is in town!

848279374.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
848279374.transcript: Oh, you're a quick one, ain't ya?

851744062.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
851744062.transcript: You can look, but no touching. That would not bode well.

855740967.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
855740967.transcript: Anyone else get a chill down their spine? No?

861400045.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
861400045.transcript: I am? I mean, yes! I am! Ha ha! Finally, someone gets it!

896237703.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
896237703.transcript: So you wield primeval darkness. That's pretty cool.

897975882.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
897975882.transcript: Good hustle, champ! You're number one!

927231431.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
927231431.transcript: Theoretically speaking, what would happen if I became your vassal?

947568066.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
947568066.transcript: I'm impressed, Zeta! In fact, I think you're ready to fly solo!

949564415.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
949564415.transcript: That magic show was so moving!

965386078.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
965386078.transcript: Well, milady, I humbly accept your kind words.

974199305.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
974199305.transcript: Gotta say, Megs, those magic swords of yours sure are interesting.

982834583.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
982834583.transcript: Our teamwork has me in tears!

993398580.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
993398580.transcript: Where we're going, nobody can stop this duo!

998654086.label: PL2200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
998654086.transcript: Hearing that from the Rose Queen... I'm gonna blush.

1001802885.label: PL2200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
1001802885.transcript: I'm just happy to do my part.

715179306.label: PL2200_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
715179306.transcript: Don't mind if I do. My compliments to the chef.
